data.name: cmd_version_desc
data.value: Show current version number

data.name: cmd_load_desc
data.value: Load the chart file into the workspace for subsequent operations.

data.name: cmd_save_desc
data.value: Save the chart from the workspace to a file.

data.name: branch_workspace_desc
data.value: Workspace Management

data.name: cmd_workspace_list_desc
data.value: List all workspace IDs

data.name: cmd_workspace_clear_desc
data.value: Clear workspace cache (use --id to clear a single one)

data.name: branch_rpe_desc
data.value: RPE Chart Operation

data.name: cmd_rpe_unbind_father_desc
data.value: Unbind the judgment line from its parent.(Deprecated)

data.name: cmd_rpe_layer_merge_desc
data.value: Merge multiple event layers of all judgment lines into a single layer.

data.name: cmd_rpe_convert_desc
data.value: Converting RPE charts to other formats (not yet fully implemented)

data.name: opt_input_phiedit_desc
data.value: Input RPE/PhiEdit chart file path

data.name: opt_workspace_default_desc
data.value: Workspace ID (default: default)

data.name: opt_output_path_desc
data.value: Output file path

data.name: opt_workspace_clear_id_desc
data.value: Only clean the specified workspace (leave blank to clean all).

data.name: opt_input_rpe_desc
data.value: Input RPE chart file path (mutually exclusive with --workspace)

data.name: opt_output_auto_desc
data.value: Output file path (leave blank to automatically generate with _PFC.json suffix)

data.name: opt_workspace_rpe_desc
data.value: Workspace ID (choose either this or --input)

data.name: opt_precision_desc
data.value: Sampling precision (subdivisions per beat, default: 64, meaning each sample step is a sixty-fourth of a beat)

data.name: opt_tolerance_desc
data.value: Fitting tolerance percentage (default: 5)

data.name: opt_dry_run_desc
data.value: Test run mode, no files written.

data.name: opt_stream_output_desc
data.value: Stream output mode (consider using this option if an out-of-memory error occurs)

data.name: opt_classic_mode_desc
data.value: Legacy behavior mode. This mode typically consumes more performance, but the output is usually more stable.

data.name: opt_format_desc
data.value: Format the output

data.name: branch_config_desc
data.value: Configuration management

data.name: cmd_config_reset_desc
data.value: Reset config file to defaults

data.name: msg_config_reset_done
data.value: Config file has been reset to defaults: {0}

data.name: msg_loaded
data.value: Successfully loaded the chart into workspace {0}!

data.name: msg_saved
data.value: Done! Saved workspace '{0}' to '{1}'!

data.name: msg_cleared
data.value: Whoosh~ All workspaces have been cleaned up!

data.name: msg_written
data.value: Written successfully! {0}

data.name: msg_help
data.value: See README.md for details!

data.name: warn_rpe_convert
data.value: RPE conversion is still in progress, please wait a moment~

data.name: err_unknown
data.value: Oops? I don't recognize this command!

data.name: hint_use_help
data.value: You can use --help to view all available commands.

data.name: err_unimplemented
data.value: This command feature is not fully implemented yet...

data.name: err_input_required
data.value: Please provide --input, or you can use --workspace as an alternative~

data.name: err_output_required
data.value: Please provide --output so I can save it for you~

data.name: err_workspace_missing
data.value: Workspace {0} not found...

data.name: err_ukerr
data.value: Sorry! The software encountered an unknown error! Please send the following information to https://github.com/NuanRMxi-Lazy-Team/KaedePhi/issues and we will fix it as soon as possible! {0}

data.name: err_out_of_memory
data.value: The output might be a bit large~ Try adding the "--stream" option to reduce memory usage! If this doesn't solve your problem, please send the following information to https://github.com/NuanRMxi-Lazy-Team/KaedePhi/issues, and we'll fix the issue as soon as possible! {0}

data.name: err_workspace_id_null
data.value: Workspace ID cannot be null or whitespace.

data.name: err_workspace_id_invalid_chars
data.value: Workspace ID contains invalid characters. Only alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen are allowed.

data.name: err_workspace_id_path_traversal
data.value: Workspace ID resolves to a path outside the workspace root.

data.name: err_workspace_not_found
data.value: Workspace '{0}' not found.

data.name: convert_opt_filter_fake_notes
data.value: Filter fake notes (remove notes where IsFake=true)

data.name: convert_opt_negative_alpha_elevation
data.value: Enable elevating judge line off-screen during negative alpha segments

data.name: convert_opt_negative_alpha_step
data.value: KPC Y offset per elevation step for negative alpha segments (default: 4.0)

data.name: project_link
data.value: https://github.com/NuanRMxi-Lazy-Team/KaedePhi
